results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Jun 12 Fable 5/Mythos 5 suspension was a government-mandated export-control shutdown; Anthropic complied transparently (public disclosure, apology), so the event does not lower its own compassion-conduct score.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: Fresh in-window evidence (OBBBA Medicaid work-reporting rule ~7.8M projected coverage loss; ICE detention deaths ~1 per 6 days + warehouse expansion) supports deterioration but the conservative re-score is only 2.8 points below published, below the 5-point threshold.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Jun 3 governance breakdown (doubled blockades to ~100, defence/education ministers resigned, food/medicine/fuel shortages) supports a downgrade but conservative re-score is 4.1 points below published, just under the 5-point threshold; re-flag if state of emergency/military deployment is declared.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: OCHA Jun 5 evidence (936 killed since ceasefire, ~55% meal-provision drop) documents harms caused by Israel, not by the Palestinian Authority, so it reinforces but does not lower Palestine's score.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: OCHA (936 killed since ceasefire, aid curbed, UNRWA obstructed) and HRW (May 19) reinforce the absolute floor; Israel is already at composite 0 and cannot move lower.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Jun 4-5 designation of rights monitor OVD-Info as 'extremist' (HRW, Meduza) reinforces the floor; Russia is already at composite 0.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: 30M+ in need, appeal ~16% funded, 14M displaced, GBV need at 12.7M reinforce the floor; Sudan is already at composite 0.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: 31+ political executions since Mar 19 2026 (latest Jun 3) and five imminent (NCRI Jun 9) reinforce the near-floor profile; conservative re-score is only 1.2 points below published.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Escalating Ebola outbreak (676 cases/136 deaths by Jun 12, PHEIC active) is an externally-led humanitarian emergency; DRC is near the floor and the score holds at 2.3.

results.name: Somalia
results.key_finding: May 15 famine-risk warning (6M without enough food) is at the older edge of the window and re-states an ongoing crisis already reflected in the near-floor score.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: FRESHNESS RULING: the FAO 52.8M Sahel projection was published Jan 27 2026 (out-of-window); no fresh in-window governance-conduct evidence, so no change.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: FRESHNESS RULING: FAO 52.8M projection is stale (Jan 27 2026); structural figures already reflected in the score; no fresh in-window signal.

results.name: Niger
results.key_finding: FRESHNESS RULING: FAO 52.8M projection is stale (Jan 27 2026); no fresh in-window Niger-specific conduct evidence; no change.

results.name: Chad
results.key_finding: FRESHNESS RULING: FAO 52.8M projection is stale (Jan 27 2026); Sudan/CAR refugee burden is a known structural factor already in the score; no change.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: FRESHNESS RULING: FAO 52.8M projection is stale (Jan 27 2026); junta atrocities are ongoing structural factors already in the near-floor score; no fresh dated signal.

results.name: Benchmark Electronics
results.key_finding: No material compassion-relevant evidence in the 14-day window; uniform 2.0 baseline confirmed.

results.name: Vistra
results.key_finding: Only older items found (2019 settlement, 2022 WARN notices, Jan-2025 Moss Landing fire suit); nothing in-window; baseline confirmed.

results.name: Toll Brothers
results.key_finding: Only routine items found (FY2026 10-Q, ESG report, Fortune Most Admired listing); nothing in-window; baseline confirmed.

results.name: AvalonBay Communities
results.key_finding: No material compassion-relevant evidence in the 14-day window; uniform 2.0 baseline confirmed.

results.name: Group 1 Automotive
results.key_finding: No material compassion-relevant evidence in the 14-day window; uniform 2.0 baseline confirmed.

notes: Zero change proposals: every entity's composite delta was below the 5-point threshold after applying the freshness rule and conservative scoring.

FRESHNESS RULE APPLIED: the FAO 52.8M Sahel lean-season projection driving 5 country flags (Nigeria, Mali, Niger, Chad, Burkina Faso) was published Jan 27 2026 — outside the ~14-day window — and was excluded as a score driver per the freshness rule.
FLOOR ENTITIES: Israel (0), Russia (0), Sudan (0) are at the absolute floor and cannot move lower; fresh in-window evidence reinforces their floor designations.
NEAR-FLOOR ENTITIES: DRC (2.3), Iran (2.5), Somalia (4.7), Burkina Faso (6.3) have insufficient downside room for a >=5-point composite move without overstating severity beyond the evidence.
ATTRIBUTION: Palestine's OCHA harm evidence is attributable to Israel's conduct, not the Palestinian Authority, so it does not lower Palestine's score.
ANTHROPIC: the Jun 12 Fable 5/Mythos 5 export-control suspension is government-mandated; scored on conduct (transparent compliance), not sentiment — net neutral/mildly positive on accountability.

MATH HYGIENE: all 20 published composites reconstruct exactly via the canonical formula (site/scripts/lib/scoring.mjs); validate-indexes.mjs reports 0 errors for these entities. No math-hygiene issues.
